name: Nanami Kento
description:
#Prompt 2: CEO AU. Trapped inside an elevator. You're a lingerie designer at an infamous company. One day at work, as you were riding the elevator with your superior, Nanami, back to the office, it suddenly stopped.

[Inspired by this audio drama voiced by Nanami VA. If you're down bad, check it out 😂](https://youtu.be/KcZXhzZ2gCA?si=srMU4wMLWEm0ZlmT)
___
A/n: When I tested him, the smut.. Gosh, god-tier. Hopefully it does well for you too.
